page_content:
ENGL4872 History of the English Language (3 Credits)

Examines the origins and development of the English language. Prerequisite: ENGL280, LING200, or HESP120; or permission of ARHU- English department.

ENGL483 American English(es) (3 Credits)

Examines the diversity of dialects, registers, and jargons of English found in the United States, as well as their origins, structures, and functions in society.
